summary: The diff implements logo usage in both Navbar and Footer components, referencing the logo image. However, the image path used in Footer.tsx is '/assets/generated/topper-ignite-logo.dim_256x256.png' rather than the required '/assets/generated/topper-ignite-logo.png'. Additionally, the actual static asset file (topper-ignite-logo.png) does not appear in the diff as an added file, meaning the asset itself may not have been saved. The Navbar changes are only described in the file summary, not shown in the diff directly.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the uploaded Topper Ignite logo as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/topper-ignite-logo.png
missing_requirements.reason: No file was added under frontend/public/assets/generated/ in the diff. The 'ADDED FILES' section shows none, so the actual PNG asset does not appear to have been saved.

missing_requirements.requirement: The logo image must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated/topper-ignite-logo.png (without the .dim_256x256 suffix)
missing_requirements.reason: Footer.tsx references '/assets/generated/topper-ignite-logo.dim_256x256.png' rather than '/assets/generated/topper-ignite-logo.png' as specified in the requirements.
